title: hormathophylla spathulata
intro: Hormathophylla spathulata, also known as cushion spurry or spurry, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
